characters.name: Al
characters.description: AlBiographical InformationStatusAliveProfessional InformationProfessionTruck driver(former)AppearancesOnlyWhite LionSeasons1Portrayed byPeter New Alis a truck driver who sold his truck to Ronald. Al was unable to be a truck driver due to sciatica making him unable to sit for ten hours a day. He listed his truck on Facebook Marketplace and Ronald came to look at it. He encouraged Ronald to climb inside, saying he'd hear the scream of the open road.

characters.name: Gil Amaya
characters.description: Gil AmayaBiographical InformationStatusAliveFamilial InformationChildrenRosie AmayaAppearancesFirstWhite LionLastBitter RootsCount3Seasons1Portrayed byCarlos Gomez Gil Amayais the Kleinsasser's former ranch manager. Gil worked for the Kleinsassers as their ranch manager for 25 years until he was let go and locked out of the caretaker's cabin. Soon after that, his daughter, Rosie, was attacked by two of the Kleinsasser sons, Rand and John Wayne, who framed their brother, Blake, for the attack.

characters.name: Gil Amaya
characters.description: Gil AmayaBiographical InformationStatusAliveFamilial InformationChildrenRosie AmayaAppearancesFirstWhite LionLastBitter RootsCount3Seasons1Portrayed byCarlos Gomez Gil Amayais the Kleinsasser's former ranch manager. Gil worked for the Kleinsassers as their ranch manager for 25 years until he was let go and locked out of the caretaker's cabin. Soon after that, his daughter, Rosie, was attacked by two of the Kleinsasser sons, Rand and John Wayne, who framed their brother, Blake, for the attack.

characters.name: Rosie Amaya
characters.description: Rosie AmayaBiographical InformationStatusAliveFamilial InformationParentsGil AmayaAppearancesFirstNo Better Than DogsLastBitter RootsCount4Seasons1Portrayed byMichelle Veintimilla Rosie Amayais the daughter of the Kleinsassers' former ranch manager. Rosie was assaulted after spending an evening catching up with Blake Kleinsasser, who had recently returned home. Blake was arrested for the assault, but maintained his innocence. Jenny and Cassie got help from Mark Lindor, a US Marshal, to find where Rosie was staying and went to talk to her. When they arrived at her location, she held a gun on them until they explained who they were. Rosie took them inside and explained to them everything she remembered from that night, starting with having a good time with Blake, who was the same good guy she'd known since they were kids. Then she blacked out, which she said felt the same as a college friend who had been roofied. When she woke up, she was bruised and bloodied all over. She didn't believe Blake could do something like that. Then she started having flashes and remembered that Rand was there that night.[1]

characters.name: Rosie Amaya
characters.description: Rosie AmayaBiographical InformationStatusAliveFamilial InformationParentsGil AmayaAppearancesFirstNo Better Than DogsLastBitter RootsCount4Seasons1Portrayed byMichelle Veintimilla Rosie Amayais the daughter of the Kleinsassers' former ranch manager. characters.name: Ana
characters.description: AnaBiographical InformationStatusAliveFamilial InformationSiblingsT-Lock(brother)AppearancesOnlyDo No HarmSeasons2Portrayed byLora Martinez-Cunningham Anais a character onABCdrama seriesBig Sky. She isT-Lock's sister.

characters.name: Angela
characters.description: AngelaBiographical InformationStatusDeceasedProfessional InformationProfessionReceptionistWorkplaceLochsa County Sheriff's DepartmentAppearancesFirstAll Kinds of SnakesLastNice AnimalsCount4Seasons1Portrayed byRachel Colwell Angelais a receptionist at the Lochsa County Sheriff's Department. Angela was the front desk when Jenny and Cassie came in to talk toSheriff Wagy. She went to check if Wagy had the time to talk to them. Later, as Cassie and Jenny went to leave, Jenny gave Angela her card and asked her to call when the evidence in the Rosie Amaya case came back. Angela followed them out of the building and asked where they were staying so she could come to them if anything came in. When she noticedDeputy Al Gregorwatching her, she said she get back to work.[1]

characters.name: Beau Arlen
characters.description: Beau ArlenBiographical InformationStatusAliveFamilial InformationMaritalCarla De Lugo(ex-wife)ChildrenEmily Arlen(daughter)SiblingsUnnamed brotherProfessional InformationProfessionSheriffWorkplaceClark County Sheriff's OfficeAppearancesFirstCatch a Few FishLastThat Old FeelingCount14Seasons2,3Portrayed byJensen Ackles Beau Arlenwas initially a guest starring character who first appeared during thesecond seasonofABCdrama seriesBig Sky. He was promoted to series regular fromSeason 3onward.[1] Beau's ex-wife, Carla, left him after his partner had been killed in the line of duty. However, it should be noted she tried to help him as much as possible. She later married a man namedAvery McCallister.

characters.name: Mitchell Banks
characters.description: Mitchell BanksBiographical InformationStatusAliveFamilial InformationMaritalWifeAppearancesOnlyPilotSeasons1Portrayed byTerry Chen Mitchell Banksis a man who got stuck in mud and needed Legarski's help to get free. While driving through Montana, Mitchell stopped to take a picture of some elk. When he tried to leave, he learned that his car had become stuck in the mud. He spun the wheels fruitlessly, trying to get out, until State Trooper Rick Legarski found him. Legarski told Mitchell to press the accelerator gently in order to get out of the mud. Once Mitchell was free, he went on his way.

characters.name: Ben
characters.description: BenBiographical InformationStatusAliveFamilial InformationMaritalMelissa(wife)AppearancesOnlyI Fall to PiecesSeasons1Portrayed byTodd Mann Benis Melissa's husband. When Jerrie felt unsafe staying at her home because the trucker had left a threatening note on her door, Ben and his wife, Melissa, took her in. They assured her they were happy to have her and Ben even said his top fantasy was a bad guy breaking into their house and getting to blow his head off.

She is the daughter of a drug lord who oversees the cartel's expansion of Montana. Ren was following the footsteps of her father Veer but after she turned against him she and her younger brother disbanded the drug cartell and went their separate ways.

characters.name: Denise Brisbane
characters.description: Denise BrisbaneBiographical InformationStatusAliveFamilial InformationOthersSally(cousin)Professional InformationProfessionAssistantWorkplaceDewell & Hoyt Private InvestigationsAppearancesFirstPilotLastThat Old FeelingCount47Seasons1,2,3Portrayed byDedee Pfeiffer Denise Brisbaneis the main character ofABCdrama seriesBig Sky. She is Jenny and Cassie's assistant. When Cassie and Jenny had a confrontation in the D&H office over Cassie's affair with Cody, Denise tried to stay out of it, though Jenny knew she knew about the affair. When Jenny left, Denise called Cody and suggested he might come in. When he did so, she told him he should have seen the train wreck coming.

characters.name: Paul Calgrove
characters.description: Paul CalgroveBiographical InformationStatusDeceasedAliasThe SnailAppearancesOnlyCatastrophic ThinkingSeasons1Portrayed byAdam Bogen Paul Calgroveis a criminal who attackedAlan Hedley. Paul and his partner,Raymond, met withAlan Hedleyat a motel. Things quickly went south and Paul pulled a weapon on Alan. However, before he could fire, Jenny and Cassie came in and distracted Paul and Raymond while Alan hid in the bathroom with the case he'd brought. Jenny and Cassie convinced Paul and Raymond to leave.
